moduleCompletionRules: All required lessons within the module must meet their completion rules.
Any linked module assessment must reach the configured pass mark before the module is marked complete.
Modules with faculty-reviewed responses remain in progress until the review state is resolved.
assessmentCompletionRules: MCQ and image-interpretation items are auto-scored where answer keys are present.
Short-answer and case-reasoning items can require faculty review before final grading.
A failed assessment may be retried only within the configured retry allowance.
certificateEligibility: Capstone case review passed with faculty approval
Final assessment and certification module passed
No unresolved academic integrity or faculty moderation flags
distinctionEligibility: Overall assessed average at or above 85 percent
Capstone and final certification assessments passed on the first permitted sitting
No unresolved faculty concerns on short-answer or case-based work
